name: conversationEngine appends transition hint when message contains intent keywords (PHASE-19 FIX 3)
description: Deterministic: _hasTransitionIntent() returns true for known phrases ('اعمل مقترح', 'خلصنا', 'جاهز', ...) and false for neutral messages. The hint constant contains the button text 'اعرض ملخّص فكرتي' to guarantee UI/backend sync. No LLM call.
